name: Can I file workers comp for a neck strain I got lifting boxes at my warehouse job in Ogden?
description: Yes, if work-related; report immediately and get doctor confirmation.

mainEntity.name: Can I file workers comp for a neck strain I got lifting boxes at my warehouse job in Ogden?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, if work-related; report immediately and get doctor confirmation.
acceptedAnswer.description: **Yes, neck strains from lifting at work are typically compensable under Utah workers' compensation if causally linked to the job.** Utah courts recognize workplace neck injuries as covered when medical evidence supports the connection.[1] Key factors: Prove injury occurred at work; no fault needed; pre-existing conditions may complicate if not aggravated by work. Report promptly, get medical eval, file formal claim via employer. An attorney can help ensure approval.
